description: Every PostHog resource in one CLI — with offline search, agent-native output, and cross-resource analytics no dashboard exposes.

novel_features.name: Flag Blast Radius
novel_features.description: Find every insight, dashboard, experiment, and survey that references a flag before you archive or rename it.

novel_features.name: Flag Rollout Health
novel_features.description: Go/no-go confidence for a flag ramp — error rate and key metric movement correlated with flag exposure.

novel_features.name: LLM Cost Attribution
novel_features.description: Break down LLM spend by feature flag variant — see whether the expensive model variant pays for itself.

novel_features.name: Persons At-Risk
novel_features.description: Surface which users in a cohort are going quiet and recently hit errors — before they churn.

novel_features.name: Event Property Drift
novel_features.description: Catch tracking regressions — properties that silently disappeared from an event between two time windows.

novel_features.name: Experiment Pre-Check
novel_features.description: Know today whether an experiment will reach significance this sprint, or needs traffic adjustment now.

novel_features.name: Flag Stale Finder
novel_features.description: List flags that haven't been evaluated in N days — cleanup candidates before they accumulate.

novel_features.name: Dashboard Health
novel_features.description: Find broken dashboards before a stakeholder meeting does — stale data, deleted cohorts, archived flags.
